title: GSD Cost Event
description: One line per agent spawn in .planning/cost-events.jsonl

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of the event

session_id.description: Unique session identifier (e.g. YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS or UUID)

phase.description: GSD phase number or name (e.g. '72', '72.1'), null if not phase-bound

agent_type.description: Agent type: orchestrator, planner, executor, reviewer, researcher, etc.

provider.description: AI provider: anthropic, openai, google, etc.

cached_input_tokens.description: Input tokens served from cache (subset of input_tokens)

cost_cents.description: Total cost in US cents for this event
